action.proof_term:
intro n hn hdvd hclass
  rcases hclass with hp | ⟨p, hp, hp2⟩
  · exact hp
  · exfalso
    obtain ⟨q, hq⟩ := hdvd
    rcases hp.eq_two_or_odd' with htwo | hodd
    · rw [htwo] at hp2
      norm_num at hp2
      omega
    · obtain ⟨r, hr⟩ := hodd
      obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := Nat.even_mul_succ_self r
      have hsq : p ^ 2 = 8 * t + 1 := by
        rw [hr]
        nlinarith [ht]
      omega

intro n hn hdvd hclass
  rcases hclass with hp | ⟨p, hp, hp2⟩
  · exact hp
  · exfalso
    obtain ⟨q, hq⟩ := hdvd
    rcases hp.eq_two_or_odd' with htwo | hodd
    · rw [htwo] at hp2
      norm_num at hp2
      omega
    · obtain ⟨r, hr⟩ := hodd
      obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := Nat.even_mul_succ_self r
      have hsq : p ^ 2 = 8 * t + 1 := by
        rw [hr]
        nlinarith [ht]
      omega

info.lean_statement: ∀ n : ℕ, 84 < n → 2520 ∣ n → (Nat.Prime (n - 1) ∨ ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ n - 1 = p ^ 2) → Nat.Prime (n - 1)

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
